untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) VIX persistence tracking over 3+ consecutive days—no indicator available for multi-bar history; (2) Detection of limit-down moves—not expressible with allowed operators; (3) Account equity ratio checks (>150% of max loss)—portfolio/risk management logic outside indicator scope; (4) Dynamic position sizing based on account equity—requires external portfolio state; (5) Contrarian technical divergence detection—not available in allowed indicators
translation_notes: Partially translated using india_vix as volatility proxy and rsi_14 for contrarian extremes. Entry logic adapted for CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction: LONG when VIX elevated + oversold (RSI<20), SHORT when VIX elevated + overbought (RSI>80). Exit at 3% profit represents 50% position exit; trailing stop and equity-based position management cannot be encoded in condition rules. Original signal requires real-time multi-day regime tracking and portfolio-level constraints beyond indicator-based rules.
